goal: Enable coordinator to fetch pending/active submissions filtered by announcement and status.
summary: Phase 2 completed: GET /api/groups and GET /api/theses now accept announcementId and status query filters, enabling the coordinator announcement submissions view to fetch pending groups and theses per announcement. The optional combined endpoint was skipped because two targeted calls are sufficient.
stepSummaries:
1. Add announcementId and status filters to GET /api/groups and GET /api/theses. [verified]
  2. Add or reuse endpoint that returns both groups and theses for a given announcement (optional helper). [skipped]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Step 1 verified with grep and node require; step 2 was intentionally skipped because the new filters already satisfy the requirement.
gateVerdicts.evidence: groupController.js and thesisController.js contain announcementId/status filters and load without syntax errors.

gateVerdicts.rationale: The phase output enables per-announcement coordinator views: /api/groups?announcementId=X&status=PENDING returns bachelor submissions; /api/theses?announcementId=X&status=PENDING returns master submissions.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Both controllers read req.query.announcementId and req.query.status.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. Combined endpoint was explicitly scoped out as unnecessary.
